debug_info.goal:
case refine_1
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : FunCont f
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hfa : f a < 0
hfb : 0 < f b
S : Set ℝ := {x | x ∈ Icc a b ∧ f x < 0}
a_in_S : a ∈ S
Snonempty : S.Nonempty
Sbounded : IsUB S b
c : ℝ
hc : IsLUB S c
a_le_c : a ≤ c
c_le_b : c ≤ b
fc_lt : ¬f c < 0
fc_gt : ¬0 < f c
fc : f c = 0
hc' : c ∈ Icc a b
hca : a ≠ c
hcb : b ≠ c
⊢ a < c

failed_attempts:
contradiction
    exact h₁
  -- Prove c < b
  · have h₁ : c < b := by
      by_contra h
      have h₂ : b ≤ c := by linarith
      have h₃ : c ≤ b := c_le_b
      have h₄ : c = b := by linarith
      have h₅ : b ≠ c := hcb
      contradiction
    exact h₁

-- If c ≥ b, then c = b because c ≤ b and c ≥ b
    have h₁ : b ≤ c := by linarith
    have h₂ : c = b := by linarith
    linarith

linarith
    rw [h₂] at fc_gt
    exact fc_gt (by simpa [h₂] using hfb)

have h₃ : b ≠ c := hcb
    apply

· -- Prove c < b
    by_contra h
    have h₁ : b ≤ c := by linarith
    have h₂ : c ≤ b := c_le_b
    have h₃ : c = b := by linarith
    have h₄ : f c = 0 := fc
    rw [h₃] at h₄
    linarith [hfb]

· by_contra h
    have h₁ : b ≤ c := by linarith
    have h₂ : c = b := by linarith [c_le_b]
    rw [h₂] at fc
    linarith [hfb]

· -- Prove c < b
    by_contra h
    have h₁ : b ≤ c := by linarith
    have h₂ : c = b := by
      have h₃ : c ≤ b := c_le_b
      have h₄ : b ≤ c := h₁
      linarith
    rw [h₂] at fc
    have h₃ : 0 < f b := hfb
    linarith [hfb]

have h₂ : c = b := by
      have h₃ : c ≤ b := c_le_b
      linarith
    apply hcb
    linarith
  <;> norm_num at *
  <;> linarith

· -- Prove `c < b`
    apply lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b
    exact Ne.symm hcb

have h₄ : f c = f a := by rw [h₃]
      have h₅ : f c < 0 := by
        rw [h₄]
        exact hfa
      have h₆ : ¬f c < 0 := fc_lt
      contradiction
    exact h₁
  · -- Prove c < b
    have h₁ : c < b := by
      by_contra h
      have h₂ : c ≥ b := by linarith
      have h₃ : c = b := by
        linarith [c_le_b]
      have h₄ : f c = f b := by rw [h₃]
      have h₅ : 0 < f c := by
        rw [h₄]
        exact hfb
      have h₆ : ¬0 < f c := fc_gt
      contradiction
    exact h₁

have h₃ : f c = f a := by rw [h₂]
    have h₄ : f c < 0 := by
      have h₅ : a ∈ S := a_in_S
      have h₆ : a ≤ c := a_le_c
      have h₇ : c = a := by linarith
      have h₈ : f a < 0 := hfa
      have h₉ : f c < 0 := by
        rw [h₇]
        exact h₈
      exact h₉
    exact fc_lt h₄
  · -- Prove c < b
    by_contra h
    have h₁ : c ≥ b := by linarith
    have h₂ : c = b := by linarith [c_le_b]
    have h₃ : f c = f b := by rw [h₂]
    have h₄ : 0 < f c := by
      have h₅ : 0 < f b := hfb
      have h₆ : f c = f b := h₃
      linarith
    exact fc_gt h₄

linarith [hfb]
    have h₇ : a + δ / 2 ∈ S := by
      refine' ⟨⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩, _⟩
      have h₈ := hδ (a + δ / 2) (by
        rw [abs_lt]
        constructor <;> linarith [hδpos])
      have h₉ : |(a + δ / 2) - a| < δ := by
        rw [abs_lt]
        constructor <;> linarith [hδpos]
      have h₁₀ : |f (a + δ / 2) - f a| < -f a / 2 := by
        specialize hδ (a + δ / 2) h₉
        linarith
      have h₁₁ : f (a + δ / 2) < 0 := by
        have h₁₂ : f (a + δ / 2) - f a < -f a / 2 := by
          linarith [abs_lt.mp h₁₀]
        linarith
      exact h₁₁
    have h₈ : a + δ / 2 ≤ a := by
      have h₉ : a + δ / 2 ∈ S := h₇
      have h₁₀ : IsLUB S a := by simpa [h₁] using hc
      have h₁₁ : a + δ / 2 ≤ a := by
        have h₁₂ : IsLUB S a := h₁₀
        exact h₁₂.1 h₉
      exact h₁₁
    linarith [hδpos]
  · -- Prove c < b
    by_contra! h
    have h₁ : c = b := by linarith
    have h₂ : f c = 0 := fc
    rw [h₁] at h₂
    linarith [hfb]

have h₄ : 0 < f c := by
      rw [h₃]
      exact hfb
    contradiction
